author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Decision: Replace the inner loop with a stride-based multi-index counter that avoids modulo/division. For each output element, increment the ndim-counter array and carry over — this is O(1) amortized per element (like an odometer) vs O(ndim) per element for modulo decomposition. Also special-case the innermost dimension when both inputs are contiguous there (stride != 0) for a tight inner loop.
